headline: Raymond James Recruits Financial Advisor Teams With $1.5 Billion in Assets
summary: The St. Petersburg, Fla., brokerage firm has added wealth management teams based in Denver and Rochester, N.Y.

raw.headline: Raymond James Recruits Financial Advisor Teams With $1.5 Billion in Assets

headline: Will Raymond James' Expansion Strategy Fuel Revenue Growth?
summary: RJF ramps up acquisitions, from Clark Capital to GreensLedge, to expand asset management, boost AUM and drive recurring fee-based revenue growth.

raw.headline: Will Raymond James' Expansion Strategy Fuel Revenue Growth?
raw.summary: RJF ramps up acquisitions, from Clark Capital to GreensLedge, to expand asset management, boost AUM and drive recurring fee-based revenue growth.

headline: How The Raymond James (RJF) Story Is Shifting With Mixed Analyst Calls And Buybacks
summary: Analysts have been revising their price targets on Raymond James Financial, with recent moves including US$7 and US$15 increases on the bullish side and a US$6 cut from more cautious voices. Those shifts line up with a split narrative, where some analysts highlight confidence in the business model and earnings power, while others question how much upside is left at current levels. As you read on, you will see how these competing calls shape the story and what to watch to keep up with the...

headline: What Raymond James Financial (RJF)'s Record Client Assets but Revenue Miss Reveal About Its Strategy
summary: In late February 2026, Raymond James Financial reported record quarterly revenue of US$3.70 billion, year-over-year growth in client assets to US$1.71 trillion, but a slight revenue miss versus analyst expectations and only a narrow earnings beat. Despite highlighting adviser recruiting strength, a client-first model that avoids mandated cross-selling, and heavy AI and technology investment, the mixed quarter raised questions about how effectively these initiatives are translating into...

headline: Assessing Raymond James Financial (RJF) Valuation After Recent Share Price Momentum
summary: With no single headline event driving attention to Raymond James Financial (RJF) today, the focus for investors is on how its recent share performance and financial profile line up against its current market valuation. See our latest analysis for Raymond James Financial. At a latest share price of $156.30, Raymond James Financial has seen a 1-year total shareholder return of 10.1%. The 30-day share price return of 5.96% and year to date share price return of 4.46% suggest some recent...

headline: Does Antero Resources’ (AR) Portfolio Repositioning Truly Strengthen Its Balance Sheet Story?
summary: Earlier this week, Antero Resources participated in Raymond James & Associates’ 47th Annual Institutional Investors Conference and posted its investor presentation online, outlining its operations, capital structure, and portfolio repositioning following the sale of most Utica Shale assets to reduce debt. This combination of active institutional outreach and portfolio reshaping highlights how Antero is working to strengthen its balance sheet while keeping large investors closely...
